<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## Category
<!-- Which area of vitalDSP does this feature relate to? (check all that apply) -->

- [ ] Signal Processing (filtering, transforms, etc.)
- [ ] Physiological Features (HRV, frequency domain, etc.)
- [ ] Machine Learning (models, training, explainability)
- [ ] Quality Assessment (signal quality, artifact detection)
- [ ] Data Processing (loaders, preprocessing)
- [ ] Web Application (UI, visualization)
- [ ] API (REST endpoints, responses)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance/Optimization
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->

- [ ] Critical - Blocking my work
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Would be nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here -->

### Related Work
<!-- Are there similar features in other libraries? Please provide links or references -->

### Implementation Considerations
<!-- Optional: If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented -->

### Potential Impact
<!-- How would this feature affect existing functionality? -->
- [ ] Backward compatible (no breaking changes)
- [ ] May require breaking changes
- [ ] New functionality (no impact on existing code)
- [ ] Unsure

## Willingness to Contribute
<!-- Are you willing to contribute to implementing this feature? -->

- [ ] I can submit a pull request for this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] I need someone else to implement this

## Checklist
<!-- Please check the following before submitting -->

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and pull requests to ensure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case for this feature
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility
- [ ] I have provided example usage code
